items.headline: Muscatine City Council to rule on building appeals following partial collapse
items.summary: The Muscatine City Council will consider evidence and rule on nine appeals filed by owners of buildings on the north side of the 200 block of E. 2nd St. Accordi…

items.headline: Severe weather passing SW of QC Monday evening
items.summary: A few strong storms are showing up on the radar but they're staying SW of the QC so far Monday evening. For now there is a Severe T'Storm Watch for the Quad Cit…

items.headline: John Deere named presenting sponsor of 2026 MLB at Field of Dreams game
items.summary: The Minnesota Twins and Philadelphia Phillies will play at the iconic movie site in Dyersville, Iowa, on Aug. 13.

items.headline: Quad Cities students mow lawns for free through YWCA program
items.summary: Quad Cities students are gaining job skills and community spirit by providing free lawn care to residents in need, as part of the YWCA's summer program.

items.headline: Inmate found dead at Dixon Correctional Center, Illinois DOC confirms
items.summary: Officials with the Illinois Department of Corrections said the facility is currently on a level one lockdown while an investigation into the death continues.

items.headline: Bubba's 33 plans ribbon cutting, grand opening in Davenport
items.summary: The new Bubba’s 33 at 4741 E. 53rd St., Davenport, will open at 11 a.m. Monday, July 27, according to a news release. A ribbon-cutting with the Davenport Chambe…

items.headline: Tornado Watch West of Quad Cities Monday night
items.summary: After some afternoon severe t'storms, there could be another round coming up this evening. The NWS has issued a Tornado Watch for areas West of the Quad Cities.…

items.headline: Davenport Fire Department names 2 assistant chiefs
items.summary: The Davenport Fire Department has promoted both Brian Mohr and Ryan Stremlow to assistant chief.

items.headline: Grammy Award-winning musician Kenny G coming to the Quad Cities
items.summary: The iconic saxophonist will play at the Adler Theatre on Wednesday, Nov. 18, with special guest ATLYS.

items.headline: Man arrested after 1 person shot in Rock Island
items.summary: Officials say a man was arrested after one person was shot in Rock Island early Monday.

items.headline: Lettuce recall sends some shoppers to local farmers markets
items.summary: A Cyclospora outbreak and lettuce recall have Quad Cities shoppers turning to local farmers for safe, locally grown greens.

items.headline: 7 Iowa breweries win awards from 2026 US Open Beer Championship
items.summary: Breweries from the Hawkeye State took home a total of 18 medals.
